title: Chronic illness adjustment documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports low mood, loss of interest, sleep, appetite, energy, concentration, guilt or worthlessness, duration, function, previous episodes and treatment, medical and medication history, stressors, social context, comorbidity, mania or hypomania, substance use, family history, and support assessment.
assessment.rationale: Supports mood, function and contextual assessment for chronic illness adjustment; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Depression
source.population: Adults presenting with suspected or established depressive symptoms; emergency, severe, psychotic, bipolar, or safeguarding presentations require escalation.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth depression documentation and risk screening; treatment, diagnosis, and local emergency pathways remain clinician-led.

exact_location.heading: Sections 5–7 — depressive features and structured assessment

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports low mood, loss of interest, sleep, appetite, energy, concentration, guilt or worthlessness, duration, function, previous episodes and treatment, medical and medication history, stressors, social context, comorbidity, mania or hypomania, substance use, family history, and support assessment.

assessment.text: Describes depressed mood in response to an identifiable psychosocial stressor and supports documenting single, multiple, recurrent, or continuing social and occupational stressors.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-entered stressor and adjustment-disorder differential context for chronic illness adjustment; no decision is generated.

assessment.text: Supports clinician assessment of suicide, self-harm, harm or neglect, protective and support factors, mental status, cognition, insight, substance use, medical contributors, medication history, thyroid testing, and selected blood testing when indicated.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-completed risk and mental-status documentation for chronic illness adjustment; no decision is generated.
